title: Polymorphism, Protocols, and Abstract Contracts · Runtime Lens: Oop Abc Contracts
summary: Support interchangeable storage, notification, pricing, and item-policy implementations. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop abc contracts increment in a protocol-driven circulation application. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define abstract base classes with required operations and optional shared behavior when nominal hierarchy is justified.
Use behavior-based polymorphism where callers depend on supported operations rather than concrete class identity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
